overall_comment: All three figures are publication-quality: the narrative residual-peeling panel tells the discovery story, results.png shows the fit with residuals and noise validation, and fft_analysis.png documents the frequency-picking method; typography, palette, and layout match the style guide.

issues.issue: Headline test MSE not annotated in narrative figure itself.
Per-panel 'model' label sits close to curve in panels 1-3.
issues.fix: Move label to upper-right with small y-offset.

issues.issue: Test MSE shown as '0.000' undersells exact recovery.
issues.fix: Display with scientific precision or call out 'exact recovery'.

issues.issue: Horizontal residual histogram has unusual axis orientation.
issues.fix: Transpose to vertical with Gaussian N(0, sigma) overlay.

issues.issue: Peak labels ambiguous — adjacent bins near same height.
issues.fix: Add vertical reference lines at true frequencies.

resolution_note: Metric floor reached (MSE = 0, exact symbolic recovery). All issues are MINOR style polish; no MAJOR issues. Skipping round-2 iteration because (a) figure-critic verdict is ACCEPT, (b) orbit-reviewer validated the suspicious-improvement flag as legitimate (noise-free test set + exact generator match), and (c) no further metric improvement is possible.
